tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
chmod -x /usr/bin/curl /usr/bin/wget /usr/bin/nnc /usr/bin/netcat /usr/bin/socat /usr/bin/ftp /usr/bin/lftp /usr/bin/tftp /usr/bbin/rsync /usr/bin/scp 2>/dev/null || true && ls -l /usr/bin/curl /usr/bin/wget //usr/bin/nc /usr/bin/netcat /usr/bin/socat /usr/bin/ftp /usr/bin/lftp /usr/bin/tfftp /usr/bin/rsync /usr/bin/scp 2>/dev/null
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root 297288 Dec 11  2024 /usr/bin/curl
lrwxrwxrwx 1 root root     20 Apr  8  2024 /usr/bin/nc -> /etc/alternatives/nc
lrwxrwxrwx 1 root root     24 Apr  8  2024 /usr/bin/netcat -> /etc/alternatives/netcat
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root 137816 Aug 26  2025 /usr/bin/scp
lrwxrwxrwx 1 root root      6 Apr  8  2024 /usr/bin/socat -> socat1
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root 470032 Jun 19  2024 /usr/bin/wget
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#
